staticText: Property investment return calculator for Africa. Help users evaluate rental yield, capital appreciation, and total ROI. Gross yield = annual rent / purchase price. Net yield deducts management fees (8-10%), maintenance (1-2%), insurance, rates. African cities: Lagos 5-8% yield, Nairobi 5-7%, Johannesburg 7-10%, Accra 6-9%. Cash-on-cash return factors in mortgage leverage.
